issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' not 'EndOfBattle' for '+4000 power during this battle'
Second effect object with trigger 'Trigger' and DrawCard action is not present in card text. Card only specifies: PowerBoost then TrashFromHand. This appears to be spurious data.
thenActions array is empty; should be removed or the structure simplified since there are no conditional follow-ups
